input.memoryNote: You rehearsed your proposal speech for three weeks. When the moment came you forgot every single word. You just looked at me and said 'I can't do this without you' and started crying. That was better than anything you had prepared.

meta.tiktokHook: He rehearsed his proposal speech for three weeks. He forgot every single word. He just said 'I can't do this without you' and started crying. That was better.
meta.caption: no notes. no script. just you.
meta.whyItWorks: 'That was better than anything you had prepared' is the emotional release the whole story builds to. Sendable to anyone recently engaged or anyone who's ever loved someone imperfectly.
